title: Operate as a self-contained local planner
description: Complete every accepted BUDGET workflow inside the Tally process without operational infrastructure.
target: 100% of BUDGET acceptance workflows complete with network access disabled, non-interactively, and with no Tally daemon, watcher, scheduler, service, port, or background process running before or after invocation.
load_condition: Draft, activation, plan/history read, position, contract discovery, compatibility failure, replay, and recovery scenarios.
measurement: An isolated acceptance suite disables network access, checks process state before and after each operation, and fails on prompts or background resources.
rationale: The selected scope is one local in-process capability, not a service or automation engine.
